theme: guild clearinghouse settles a season of IOUs
title: Guild Clearinghouse: Minimal-Transfer Settlement
strategies: ascending-party-id prefix-carry chain, blind to any grouping (trivial)
net every obligation, then hunt exact pair/triple zero-sum subsets of the balance vector and settle each found subset internally (strong)
true maximum disjoint zero-sum partition (NP-hard in general; open ceiling, uncovered)
